title: Simple Life Crystals
description: Easy and fully configurable Terraria style life crystals
body:
Adds rare life crystals that appear in caves between y = -64 and y = 32.

The default config allows the player to consume 10 max and gain a heart per crystal but both of those numbers can be changed.

Additional config options are provided to disable generation and also to make the generation more rare or common.

_Generation Example_


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

This is a slightly compressed visualiztion of generation with default config. Each floating lava block represents a life crystal at a random height below it.

(There is a slight bias in this example as I had to use an ocean so the blocks could be visible but oceans fit the generation conditions more commonly than other biomes)

![Lava blocks floating sparsely over over an ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b0348da45f719f9f17181dce1dcbb65c7232b4af_0.webp)

</details>

_Update 1.1:_


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Added the Mini Heart Lantern which is also fully configurable, more sizes are to come but for now this is just a test.

(it's also a very cute block that I think can work in a lot of builds)

![Build example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/976d752437fb88b10148d3dcef099f59a0f00134.png)

![Crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c58ec3f898a863127453a22cdfb220c5421aeff.png)

</details>

_Update 1.2:_


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Added a few configurable underground structures and rebalanced some generation

![Heart shrine embedded in wall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a93df2ae2c71cf64ea69f23eff2039f60a30c52_0.webp)

![Heart shrine in an ancient city (it looks cool)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c8d97a7cae9152e5579a0bc55ed64c1abbce58c_0.webp)

![Heart chamber inside a cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ab0d4e2209bdffc7f8722f2132f35b29db765c2_0.webp)

</details>

_Notes for modpack makers:_

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- If you want to give life crystals as rewards or add them to lootables, you need to use "simplelifecrystals:life_crystal_item" as "simplelifecrystals:life_crystal" is the block. They are separated for a reason I've forgotten and I don't fancy rewriting to find out why.

- Most of the structures are just made of stone/deepslate variants (bricks, walls, slabs, etc) so likely can't break progression. The heart chamber structure, however, generates with red carpet which could break progression in some finely tuned packs.

</details>



Bonus fun fact, the command "/item replace entity @a armor.head with simplelifecrystal:life_crystal" makes it look like everyone has cat ears.
